understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate the character on each BP35 level to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` within the allowed turns/attempts, while avoiding spikes (`u`/`v`) that immediately end the run when landed on.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal-only input). After a horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile (`o`, `m`, `w`), reaches the goal (`+`), or hits a hazard (spikes) and fails. CLICK interacts with clickable tiles, primarily removing breakable blocks (`x`) at a specified [x,y] to open new fall paths; clicks do not move the character. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a mistaken move or click.
